error_signature: No binary data with field data1,data2 found
title: No binary data found in output
symptom: The workflow fails to produce the expected binary data for download, resulting in an error message stating 'No binary data with field data1,data2 found'.
applies_when: Using multiple file inputs in a form
not_this_if: Binary data is present in the workflow output
root_cause: In newer versions of n8n, the method used to access binary data from the filesystem has changed. The previous method returns a reference instead of the actual file content, leading to the absence of expected binary data in the output.
fix_steps: Replace the existing Code node with a new implementation that uses 'await this.helpers.getBinaryDataBuffer()' to fetch the actual file content.
Ensure that the output from the Merge node is correctly wired into a new node that builds download links using the fetched binary data.
agent_instruction: Update the Code node to use 'await this.helpers.getBinaryDataBuffer()' for accessing binary file content.
